## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Include relevant motivation and context.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Security Checklist:
- [ ] My code does not expose any new API endpoints without authentication.
- [ ] I have not hardcoded any seed phrases or encryption keys.
- [ ] I have run `make test` and all retention/security tests pass locally.
- [ ] I have verified that any new storage mutations are properly encrypted.
